blocks.text: Bernabéu night: the Champions League quarter-finals begin

Arsenal arrive in Lisbon nine points clear at the top of the Premier League — a European run would make this their season. At the Bernabéu, whoever blinks tonight faces a second-leg mountain to climb.
♟️ 14:30 — Candidates Round 8, Cyprus — the field splits at the halfway mark

blocks.label: ⚽ Wed — CL Quarter-Finals Night 2
items: Barcelona vs Atlético Madrid, 21:00 — Camp Nou derby, La Liga's top two go European
Liverpool vs PSG, 21:00 — Parc des Princes blockbuster

blocks.text: ⛳ Thu — Masters Tournament begins at Augusta — Hovland hunts the green jacket
